label: India import duty raised to 10%
description: Third duty hike of 2013 (8% to 10%) to curb the current-account deficit — raised domestic gold prices vs international

label: India import duty raised to 12.5%
description: Union Budget 2019 raised basic customs duty on gold from 10% to 12.5%

label: COVID-19 market crash
description: Acute phase of the global COVID selloff began — gold whipsawed then rallied to record highs by August 2020

label: India import duty cut to 7.5%
description: Union Budget 2021 cut basic customs duty from 12.5% to 7.5% (plus 2.5% agri cess) — lowered domestic price vs international

label: Russia invades Ukraine
description: Full-scale invasion triggered a safe-haven rush into gold

label: India import duty hiked (effective ~15%)
description: Basic customs duty raised from 7.5% to 12.5% (effective rate ~15% with cess) to defend the rupee — domestic price jumped vs international

label: US regional banking stress (SVB)
description: Silicon Valley Bank collapse sparked banking-contagion fears — gold rallied as a safe haven

label: India import duty cut to 6%
description: Union Budget 2024 cut customs duty on gold from 15% to 6% — domestic price dropped ~6% overnight while international gold was flat

label: US Fed begins rate-cut cycle
description: First Fed rate cut of the cycle (50bp) — lower yields historically support gold

label: US sweeping tariff announcement
description: Broad US import tariffs announced — trade-war fears drove gold to record highs
